topic: Feel Good Friday — The Horse Rewards Risk-Takers

images.prompt: A woman sits at a bright desk near a large window, warm morning light pouring in. She is writing in an open journal, pen in hand, her posture relaxed and confident rather than anxious. A small stack of papers and a coffee cup are on the desk. The mood is forward-looking, warm, resolved — a moment of decision and clarity. No Mahjong tiles in this image. No text overlay. Natural, documentary style photography aesthetic.

A journal lies open on a wooden table, sunlight streaming across the pages. A pen rests on the page as though just set down. The words on the page are not legible — impressionistic. A small plant or flower in the background suggests growth and new beginnings. Warm palette: cream, amber, soft green. Optimistic, bright, intentional. No people. No text overlay.

Close-up of a hand writing in a journal, warm window light behind it. The pen is mid-stroke on a blank-ish page. The hand looks purposeful, not hesitant. Soft focus background showing natural light and a window frame. Square composition. Warm, golden-hour tone. The mood is decisive and peaceful simultaneously. No text overlay. Aspirational but grounded.
